title: Derivative-dataset spec (Frictionless + Croissant + canonical model)
context: Every derivative dataset produced by this project must follow a consistent, interoperable format: a tidy long-format CSV plus a Frictionless Tabular Data Package (datapackage.json) and Croissant ML JSON-LD metadata, with decoded status flags, explicit units, ISO3/M49 geography codes, reference periods, preserved uncertainty, and full provenance. A canonical metadata model serves as the single source of truth from which all outputs are projected.
objective: Document the canonical metadata model, Frictionless Data Package structure, and Croissant ML metadata schema that every derivative dataset must conform to.
acceptanceCriteria: Defines the canonical metadata model fields: id, title, source, domain, indicatorCode, indicatorDefinition, geographyLevel, referencePeriod, datasetVersion, releaseDate, license, provenance, flagsDecoded, units, uncertainty, pii, methodologyNotes, caveats, readabilityScore, notAdvice, and review.
Specifies the Frictionless Tabular Data Package v1 structure (datapackage.json with descriptor, resources, and field schema) and the Croissant ML v1.0 JSON-LD metadata structure.
Defines required tidy CSV columns: decoded status flags, units, ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country codes, UN M49 geography codes, reference periods, and published uncertainty fields.
Specifies provenance fields: sourceUrl, apiEndpoint, publisher, retrievedAt, datasetVersion, releaseDate, sourceChecksum, buildScriptRef, outputChecksum, and licenseSnapshotRef.
Pins the spec versions (Frictionless v1, Croissant ML v1.0, ISO 3166-1 alpha-3, UN M49, SPDX identifiers) and documents the version-bump process.
Output licensed CC-BY-4.0; commit is DCO signed-off.
resources: PLAN.md — Solution approach (canonical metadata model section)
Frictionless Data — Tabular Data Package / Data Package specification
ISO 3166-1 alpha-3; UN M49 standard area codes; SPDX license list
output: A committed derivative-dataset specification document (canonical metadata model + Frictionless + Croissant schema) that all dataset tasks reference.
